milestones: Selection of Intermediate Stream (MPC, BiPC, CEC, HEC, etc.)
Option to enter vocational trade training (ITI)
actions: Identify core interests and subjects of strength
Research the pathways offered by each stream or diploma
Engage in career guidance counseling
Assess requirements for preferred colleges or competitive exams early

milestones: Preparation and appearance in master entrance exams (JEE, NEET, CLAT, etc.)
Earning basic diplomas or finishing early ITI trades
actions: Focus heavily on stream core subjects
Attend mock tests and coaching classes if aiming for top colleges
Learn soft skills, basic computing, and communication
Apply for undergraduate programs and track application deadlines

milestones: Admission to B.Tech, MBBS, B.Com, BA, LLB, B.Des, etc.
Graduation ceremony and first college degree
Lateral entry validation for diploma holders (entering 2nd year B.Tech)
actions: Deep dive into specialized fields of study
Participate in internships, technical workshops, and seminars
Build a professional resume and networking profile (e.g., LinkedIn)
Determine path: Campus placements, GATE/CAT/GRE/UPSC exams, or entrepreneurship

milestones: First corporate or government job placement
Master's Degree (M.Tech, MBA, MD, MS, LLM, MA) completion
Clearing defense courses (NDA/CDS training) to serve as a commissioned officer
actions: Adapt to professional workplace environments and team dynamics
Pursue continuous learning and professional certifications
Stabilize financial planning and savings early
Acquire leadership, team management, and critical problem-solving skills

milestones: Transition into Senior Management (VP, Director, CEO, CTO, Partner)
Serving in senior military command posts or high judicial chairs (Judge, Senior Advocate)
Recognitions, awards, and contributing back to the industry
actions: Drive long-term strategic decisions in organizations
Mentor the younger generation of students and professionals
Innovate and lead industry-wide changes
Balance career success with personal wellness and philanthropy
